course/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a newer release compatible with the target environment.
Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Add the Spring Data JPA starter dependency to enable JPA support.
Add the H2 in-memory database dependency for runtime use.

course/src/main/resources/application.pr.general_idea: Added configuration to activate the test profile by default.
Added configuration to enable OpenEntityManagerInViewFilter for JPA.
